{{Quote|Ragnar VIII is remote and defendable and need not fear casual attempts at military action.|Special unit threat assessment report by New Republic Captain Zgorth'sth|<ref name="Journal15">{{JournalCite|15|Special Military Unit Intelligence Update}}</ref>}}
'''Ragnar VIII''' was a remote astronomical object<ref name="Journal15" /> located in the [[Ragnar system/Legends|Ragnar system]], a part of the [[Merel sector/Legends|Merel sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> The home offices of the [[Ragnar Syndicate]], a chapter house of the [[Bounty Hunters' Guild/Legends|Bounty Hunters' Guild]], were located on Ragnar VIII, leading to the celestial body being considered the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the house.<ref name="GG10" /> Ragnar VIII was listed as the Ragnar headquarters in an entry for the house included in the [[Bounty Hunters Guild Handbook]].<ref name="BHC">''[[The Bounty Hunter Code: From the Files of Boba Fett]]''</ref>

[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Zgorth'sth]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] eventually compiled available information on the Ragnar Syndicate as part of a threat assessment report focusing on various special units. Zgorth'sth claimed the syndicate would be able to defend Ragnar VIII against New Republic military actions and instead suggested to assorted [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic military]] leaders that [[Bounty/Legends|bounties]] should be posted on individual Ragnar [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]].<ref name="Journal15" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ragnar VIII was first mentioned in the [[1994]] sourcebook ''[[Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters]]'', written by [[Rick D. Stuart]] for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="GG10" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Ragnar [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Ragnar VIII, in grid square Q-18.<ref name="TEA" />
